offer: For medical billing specialists processing 10–20 invoices/month, manual entry causes cash flow gaps. We automate the conversion of appointment logs instead of manual entry.
problem: Inefficient conversion of appointment logs into billing submissions
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for medical billing specialists
Engage in Indie Hackers discussions on similar workflows
DM outreach to medical billing specialists with demo video
Join community forums for sharing tools and tips
try_it: Let users try manual log entry interface and basic reporting
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a 1-page landing page with CTA
Produce a short demo video of the workflow
Conduct 10 short interviews with target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly progress updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: One-click export of a simple report
